name: qwen2.5-1.5b-codemath
_comment: K=2 ablation. Drops Qwen2.5-1.5B-Instruct because its ‖Δ‖ ≈ 13 (vs ~1000 for Code and ~1600 for Math), so its body-module direction is dominated by chat-template noise after unit-norm normalisation. This config tests whether removing the noisy expert sharpens the per-position score and reduces redundancy with the weight-norm baseline.
